message:
feat(core): storage hybrid search explainability, LRU cache, until filter, and quality metrics

storage.rs (+913 lines):
- Add `lexical_contribution` and `semantic_contribution` fields to
  `HybridSearchResult` for per-result lane score attribution,
  enabling explain/debug output in hybrid search responses
- Add `requested_mode`, `fallback_reason`, `lexical_weight`,
  `semantic_weight` fields to `HybridSearchBundle` for full fusion
  audit trail (what was requested vs what actually ran)
- Integrate `crate::lru_cache::LruCache` for search result caching
  with content-hash-based keys, reducing redundant FTS5 queries
- Add \`until\` filter support in search path (previously only \`since\`
  was supported), wired through SearchOptions
- Add search quality instrumentation: timing breakdowns for lexical
  vs semantic vs fusion phases, logged at debug level
- Expand hybrid_search_with_results() to propagate lane weights and
  mode metadata through the full pipeline, including the new
  contribution tracking
- Add DefaultHasher-based cache key computation for search options

robot_types.rs (+2 lines):
- Add \`until_filter: Option<i64>\` to SearchData for robot-mode
  search responses, matching the new storage capability

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -438,6 +438,8 @@ pub struct SearchData {
     pub pane_filter: Option<u64>,
     #[serde(default)]
     pub since_filter: Option<i64>,
+    #[serde(default)]
+    pub until_filter: Option<i64>,
     /// Search mode used (fts5, lexical, semantic, hybrid, two-tier).
     #[serde(default)]
     pub mode: Option<String>,
